column12: WRITER: authored docs/learnings/today-i-learned-2026-05-30-cherry.md capturing the PM-triage + #242/#266 session. 5 lessons, all process-heavy: (1) dogfooding close.js found 2 bugs the pure-seam smoke tests missed — the pre-push banner prints on every push so string-classification of success is wrong (exit code is authority), and failed to push some refs is gits generic any-failure summary not a race signal; (2) the at_todo substring trap caught me writing TODOS.md in a code comment (pdd aborted the push); (3) editing the velocity CSV in two checkouts split + lost a row (+ deleted a false shared-inode memory note); (4) batched git/gh calls made me confabulate state again despite the existing memory — re-affirmed one-command-at-a-time; (5) the #228 stale-main guard and the #266 close gate both fired correctly and prevented loss. Index pointer already present (added by another agents edit). No code change. Single-commit close per #186; closed_commit empty. Worktree cherry-issue-239.
